page: Amazon Web Services g7.2xlarge is a graphics-intensive virtual machine instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, running an Intel processor at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the g7.2xlarge includes a single NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPU with 32 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is bundled with the instance, consisting of a 440 GB NVMe SSD. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps.

This hardware profile is designed for graphics-intensive applications, 3D rendering, and GPU-accelerated compute tasks. The dedicated CPU cores and high-speed NVMe storage provide a balanced resource density for workloads requiring both compute and fast local data access without hyperthreading overhead.
description: Amazon Web Services g7.2xlarge is an x86_64 graphics-intensive server instance utilizing the Nitro hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated Intel CPU cores running at 3.9 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory. The instance includes a dedicated NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPU with 32 GB of VRAM, alongside 440 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. With a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps, this configuration delivers balanced compute and graphics capabilities. It is designed for workloads such as 3D rendering, graphics-intensive applications, and GPU-accelerated processing where dedicated CPU resources and fast local storage are required.
og_description: Amazon Web Services g7.2xlarge is a graphics-intensive instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel cores at 3.9 GHz, 32 GB RAM, a 32 GB NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPU, and 440 GB NVMe SSD storage.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services g7.2xlarge features 8 dedicated Intel cores, 32 GB RAM, a 32 GB NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPU, and 440 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel instance featuring an NVIDIA RTX PRO GPU and high-speed local NVMe SSD storage for graphics-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel CPU cores running at 3.9 GHz
Single NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 GPU with 32 GB VRAM
440 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Designed for graphics-intensive and GPU-accelerated workloads
